Class ViewGraphic

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
All Implemented Interfaces:
CombatInteractionDelegate
public class ViewGraphic extends Object implements CombatInteractionDelegate
Manages graphical interactions related to the backpack, such as item placement, reorganization, level-up expansions, and curse handling.

  • Constructor Details

    • ViewGraphic

      public ViewGraphic(BackPack backPack, Heros heros)
      Constructs the view with the required game components.
      Parameters:
      backPack - the hero's backpack.
      heros - the hero instance.
      factory - the factory for item generation.

  • Method Details

    • reorganize

      public void reorganize()
      Switches the interface to reorganization mode by removing all items from the bag.

    • handleKeyPress

      public void handleKeyPress(com.github.forax.zen.KeyboardEvent.Key key)
      Processes keyboard input based on the current interaction mode.
      Parameters:
      key - the key pressed by the user.

    • handleMouseClick

      public void handleMouseClick(int mx, int my, int startX, int startY)
      Processes mouse clicks to place items or unlock tiles in the backpack.
      Parameters:
      x - mouse x-coordinate.
      y - mouse y-coordinate.
      bpX - backpack UI x-start.
      bpY - backpack UI y-start.

    • render

      public void render(Graphics2D g, com.github.forax.zen.ScreenInfo screenInfo)
      Renders the current interaction UI overlay.
      Parameters:
      g - graphics context.
      screenInfo - screen dimensions.

    • handleForcedCurse

      public void handleForcedCurse(Heros h, Curse c)
      Description copied from interface: CombatInteractionDelegate
      Handles the complete interaction when an enemy forces a Curse onto the Hero. This typically involves asking the player to accept or refuse the curse.
      Specified by:
      handleForcedCurse in interface CombatInteractionDelegate
      Parameters:
      h - The Hero affected by the curse.
      c - The Curse object being inflicted.

    • handleLevelUpExpansion

      public void handleLevelUpExpansion(int levels)
      Description copied from interface: CombatInteractionDelegate
      Triggered when the hero levels up to allow the user to choose new tiles.
      Specified by:
      handleLevelUpExpansion in interface CombatInteractionDelegate
      Parameters:
      levels - Number of levels to process.
